0 Leather Large
DIOR book tote 24 Early Spring New
I have to say, Dior really knows how to play.
The tote you can carry is here! Simply amazing.
A viral hit derived from the most classic tote.
More and more people love big bags; it's truly unisex.
Whether handheld or crossbody, commuting, gym, or business trips are effortless.
Structured and doesn't collapse; I wish I could carry it every day.
Big bag lovers can buy this with your eyes closed!!

items.name_cn: 2024 New Calfskin Lady Diana Bag

specs.rawTitle: 2024 New Calfskin Lady Diana Bag

items.name_en: 2024 New Color. This Book Tote bag, designed by Dior Women's Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship piece embodying Dior aesthetics. Adorned with apricot and green Reverse Joules print embroidery throughout, it reinterprets the classic pattern with a contrasting effect, perfect for holding various daily essentials. Medium size, featuring a Christian Dior Paris logo on the front, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship, and can be carried by hand or over the shoulder.

items.name_cn:
30 Montaigne Mini Drawstring Bucket Bag
Blue Oblique print fabric
Code: S2374UTZQ
This mini drawstring bucket bag is a new arrival from the 2025 Spring/Summer collection, enriching the 30 Montaigne line with a casual and elegant design. Crafted with blue Oblique print fabric and other materials, it features a vintage gold-finish metal CD logo on the front and a drawstring compartment to hold various daily essentials. It comes with an adjustable chain shoulder strap with leather accents, allowing you to carry it by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody for a comfortable experience.
Main: Cotton, calfskin, technical fabric
Lining: Sheepskin, technical fabric
Front with CD logo
Drawstring closure
Internal compartment
3 card slots
Adjustable shoulder strap, chain part made of vintage gold-finish metal links with leather accents
Includes dust bag
Dimensions: 16 x 18.5 x 13 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder and 1 mobile phone

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
9319# Black Calfskin Medium, Actual Product!!️
Latest Bobby series, named in tribute to DI0R's pet dog, symbolizing loyalty and success, so this is a bag that can accompany you forever😘. Combining classic and fashion, the retro shape interprets the freedom, confidence, and elegance of an independent woman💃🏻. Love it to no end❤️
size: 22*17*6cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
❤️【Lady Dio.r My ABC】"Apricot Lambskin"
/5-Grid Lambskin/
This handbag embodies Dior's profound insight into elegance and beauty. Crafted from fine lambskin with a signature herringbone stitching for quilting details, its elegant and classic design is timeless. Finished with matching enamel, lined with sheep suede, and featuring a chain shoulder strap with an internal zip pocket, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size: 24×20×11 cm
